initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (CASE WHEN strftime('%m%d', Patient.Birthday) > strftime('%m%d', 'now') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS average_age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M' AND Laboratory.TP-CHO > 200;

SELECT AVG(strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (CASE WHEN strftime('%m%d', Patient.Birthday) > strftime('%m%d', 'now') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS average_age
FROM Patient

WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M' AND Laboratory.TP-CHO > 200;
